notifications.title: Notifications

notifications.fileMigratedToLocalBody: "{path}" is no longer available in this workspace.

notifications.maintenanceCancelledBody: The window scheduled for {startsAt} has been cancelled.

auth.signUpToGetStarted: Sign up to get started with Polymux

auth.agreeToTerms: By continuing, you agree to Polymux's
auth.andReceiveEmails: , and to receive periodic emails with updates.
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

auth.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated. Redirecting…
auth.verificationSuccessfulDesc: Your email has been verified. Please return to the sign in page to continue.

settings.title: Settings
settings.locationDenied: Blocked by browser — update in browser settings
settings.locationPrompt: You'll be asked to allow location access
settings.locationUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
settings.cloakedBrowserHint: Routes browser sessions through CloakBrowser when a site is known to challenge with CAPTCHA, Cloudflare, or DataDome. Off forces every navigation through the normal browser.
settings.showCursorHint: Renders an arrow cursor on top of the live browser viewport at the position the agent is hovering or clicking. Useful for watching the simulated mouse in real time. Off by default.
settings.allNotificationsHint: Master switch for non-essential emails the app sends you (workspace invitations, newsletter, etc.). Important account messages still come through.
settings.paymentPlaceholder: Payment methods and billing history will appear here in a future update.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: We're sorry to see you go. Please let us know why you're leaving so we can improve.
settings.deleteWarning: This action is permanent. All your data, chats, and workspaces will be irreversibly deleted.
settings.deleteError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.emailManagedByProvider: Email is managed by your linked account and cannot be changed here.
settings.profileUpdateError: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
settings.checkoutSuccess: Your plan has been upgraded successfully!

chat.voiceUnsupported: Voice input isn't supported in this browser. Try Chrome, Edge, or Safari.
chat.voicePermissionBlocked: Microphone access is blocked. Click the icon on the left inside your browser's address bar to enable.
chat.voiceError: Voice input failed. Please try again.
chat.tokenCapExceeded: Your message is about {tokens} tokens, which exceeds the {cap}-token input cap. Please shorten it.
chat.weeklyTokenBudgetToastFallback: Weekly Token Limit Reached. Upgrade or retry Monday UTC.

workflow.listEmptyPlaceholder: Open a workflow from the sidebar to get started.
workflow.revertBody: This will replace the current workflow with version {version}. Your unsaved edits will be discarded.
workflow.resetBody: This will reset the workflow to v{version} and permanently delete every newer version. Any unsaved edits will be discarded. This cannot be undone.
workflow.emptySubtitle: No steps yet. Start a chat to build this workflow.
workflow.noWorkflowsSubtitle: No workflow yet — it'll appear here as the agent builds one.
workflow.title: Title
workflow.titlePlaceholder: Short name of what this step achieves
workflow.actionItemPlaceholder: Describe one step the agent should carry out
workflow.actionsEmpty: No actions yet — add one to describe how the title is achieved.
workflow.detailsPlaceholder: Execution context the agent reads and updates during runs
workflow.notesPlaceholder: Your private notes — the agent does not read or modify these
workflow.versionConflictToast: Workflow was updated elsewhere. Latest version loaded — redo your edits.
workflow.remoteSaveWhileDirty: The agent saved new changes to this workflow. Save or discard your edits to see them.
workflow.agentSavedOther: The agent saved workflow '{name}' — not the one you're viewing
workflow.nodeCanvasEmpty: No nodes yet — switch to Workflow view to start building.
workflow.noToolUse: No tool details for this node.
workflow.spawnFromPort: Add a linked step in this direction
workflow.warnIsolatedNodes: Saved, but {count} node(s) are not connected to anything.
workflow.wireConditionPlaceholder: Natural-language guard — only traverse if true
workflow.wireMaxIterationsPlaceholder: Bound how many times this edge fires (loops)
workflow.lockedHint: Locked — the orchestrator and structural edits will skip this node.
workflow.lockedToast: Node is locked — unlock it to edit.
workflow.conflictToast: Orchestrator edited the node you're editing.
workflow.duplicateEdgeToast: A wire already connects those nodes.
workflow.iterationsHelp: Number of times this step runs. Default 1 (runs once).
workflow.embedEmpty: Referenced workflow has no steps yet.
workflow.embedThumbnailAlt: Mini preview of the referenced workflow
workflow.addNodeBlankDesc: A new step you write actions for
workflow.addNodeEmbedDesc: Run a saved workflow as a step
workflow.embedUnboundToast: This embed has no workflow selected — pick one in the info panel.

dashboard.noSessionsHint: Start a chat to see sessions here

console.subtitle: Active runs, schedules, and recent activity across this workspace.
console.noActiveHint: Active workflow and chat runs will appear here.
console.schedulesDesc: Workflows scheduled to run on a recurring basis

console.recentRunsDesc: Recently updated workflows in this workspace

browser.selectToMessage: Select a browser agent to start sending messages
browser.agentCapReached: Maximum number of browser agents reached
browser.modeExtensionHint: Use my local Chrome via the extension.

integrations.editorEmptyDesc: Click New to publish your first workflow, integration, or plugin.
integrations.editorPickKind: What kind of thing are you publishing?
integrations.editorNewIntegrationDesc: Code-based — manifest in your repo, HTTPS webhook handlers.
integrations.editorNewWorkflowDesc: Publish an existing workflow definition for others to install.
integrations.editorNewPluginDesc: Bundle connections and workflows together as one installable item.
integrations.editorNewLayoutDesc: Author custom HTML/CSS/JS that renders as a tab on workspace section pages.
integrations.editorLayoutSectionHelp: Which workspace section the tab attaches to.
integrations.editorLayoutBodyHelp: Raw HTML, CSS, and JS. Rendered inside a sandboxed iframe.
integrations.editorYankConfirm: Yank this version? Existing installs will be disabled.
integrations.editorManifestUrlHelp: Polymux fetches and validates the JSON, freezes a version, and generates a signing secret.
integrations.editorSlugAutoHelp: Auto-generated from your handle and the name above.
integrations.editorSigningSecretWarning: Shown once — save it. You'll need it to verify Polymux's signed requests on your end.
integrations.editorBundleNoItems: No items in this bundle yet.
integrations.editorListingNotFound: This listing could not be found.
integrations.nothingInstalled: Nothing installed yet — browse the Marketplace to add workflows, plugins, and integrations.
integrations.noInstalledSubtitle: Browse the Marketplace to connect tools, install plugins, and add workflows.
integrations.noInstalledResults: No installed items match your search.
integrations.adminOnly: Only owners and admins can manage integrations.
integrations.settingsEmptySubtitle: This integration doesn't expose any settings.
integrations.driveMigrateDone: Your workspace files are now in Google Drive.
integrations.driveMigrateSomeFailed: {count} files need attention. Open the browser console for details.
integrations.localMigrateDone: Your workspace files are now on this device.
integrations.localExportDone: Your workspace files are no longer only on this device.

workspaceCreate.title: Create workspace
workspaceCreate.subtitle: Set up a new workspace for your team.
workspaceCreate.billingNote: New workspaces start on {plan}. Plans and limits apply per workspace — you can upgrade each one separately from the Pricing page.
workspaceCreate.invitesHint: Optional — you can always add people later.
workspaceCreate.errorFallback: Failed to create workspace. Please try again.

workspaceMenu.statStorageCaption: Connect a provider to track usage
workspaceMenu.localPrimaryTeamWarning: Local storage keeps files in this browser only. Other members can't open files saved here. Connect Google Drive or enable Cloud in Storage settings to share with the team.
workspaceMenu.transferOwnershipDesc: Hand off this workspace to another member.
workspaceMenu.transferNoOthers: There are no other members in this workspace. Invite someone before transferring ownership.
workspaceMenu.transferWarning: You will become Admin after this transfer. The new owner will have full control.
workspaceMenu.deleteWorkspaceDesc: Permanently removes all sessions, files and data.
workspaceMenu.deleteWarning: You are about to permanently delete {name}. All sessions, files, and data in this workspace will be irreversibly removed.
workspaceMenu.onlyWorkspaceMsg: You must always have at least one workspace. Create another workspace before deleting this one.
workspaceMenu.inviteDesc: Add people to your workspace by email.
workspaceMenu.roleAdminLabel: Admin — Can manage members and settings
workspaceMenu.roleMemberLabel: Member — Can create and edit sessions
workspaceMenu.avatarHint: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF — up to 1 MB.
workspaceMenu.avatarErrorType: Please choose an image (PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF).
workspaceMenu.avatarErrorSize: Image must be 1 MB or smaller.
workspaceMenu.avatarErrorRead: Could not read this image. It may be corrupted.
workspaceMenu.identityUpdateError: Could not update workspace. Please try again.

share.title: Share
share.restrictedDesc: Only people with access can open with the link
share.anyoneWithLinkDesc: Anyone on the internet with the link can access
share.ownerOnly: Only workspace owners can share files
share.subdirectoryWarning: This directory is within an already shared folder

settings.title: Storage settings
settings.subtitle: Control how files are saved across your storage providers.
settings.providersDesc: Files are saved to the first available provider. Drag rows to reorder, or add another provider with the button below.
settings.allProvidersConnected: All available providers are already connected
settings.saveOrderDesc: Files are saved to the first available location. Only connected providers appear here — manage them in Connections below.
settings.saveOrderEmpty: No connected providers yet. Connect one in Connections below to start saving files.
settings.providerGoogleDriveDesc: Files saved to your workspace's Google Drive folder.
settings.providerLocalDesc: On-device storage in this browser only.
settings.providerCloudDesc: Polymux-managed storage shared with all workspace members.
settings.connectionsDesc: Connect or disconnect storage providers for this workspace.
settings.migrationNeedsTwoProviders: Connect at least two providers in Connections to migrate files between them.
settings.savePathDesc: Files flow through these providers in order.
settings.migrationDesc: Move existing workspace files between storage providers.
settings.migrationSameProvider: Source and destination must be different providers.
settings.migrationPairUnsupported: This migration path isn't supported yet.
settings.migrationSourceRequiresDrive: Connect Google Drive to migrate from it.
settings.migrationSourceLocalUnsupported: Local storage can't be used as a source.
settings.migrationDestinationLocalUnsupported: Local storage can't be used as a destination.
settings.migrationRequiresDrive: Connect Google Drive to enable this migration.
settings.migrationRequiresAdmin: Owner or admin permission is required.
settings.migrationConfirmDesc: Workspace files in {source} will be copied to {destination}, then removed from {source}.
settings.migrationConfirmBullet1: Files keep their paths and metadata.
settings.migrationConfirmBullet2: Migration runs in batches and resumes if interrupted.
settings.migrationConfirmBullet3: Files larger than 100 MB are skipped and listed afterwards.
settings.migrationAccessLossDesc: After this, the file will live only on this device. These people will no longer be able to open it.
settings.migrationAccessLossNone: No one else currently has access.

disconnect.title: Disconnect {provider}?
disconnect.subtitle: Disconnecting will sever this provider from your workspace.
disconnect.checking: Checking for files on this provider…
disconnect.checkFailed: Couldn't check for files. Please try again.
disconnect.noFiles: No workspace files live on {provider} right now. You can disconnect safely.
disconnect.fileCountWarning: {count} workspace file(s) currently live on {provider}. Pick another provider to migrate them to before disconnecting.
disconnect.noTargets: No other storage provider is available. Connect or enable one before disconnecting.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Send a note for sales, support, or partnerships. We read every message.
contact.success: Thanks — your message was sent. We will get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
contact.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

forum.heading: Polymux Forum
forum.subtitle: Ask questions, share workflows, and connect with other teams building on Polymux.
forum.couldntLoadForum: Couldn't load the forum. The database may still be warming up.
forum.noDiscussions: No discussions yet. Be the first to start one.
forum.guidelinesSubtitle: A few minutes of context means faster, friendlier answers from the community.
forum.guideline1Desc: Chances are someone already hit the same wall. A quick search often answers your question in seconds.
forum.guideline2Desc: Accurate categories put your post in front of the people most likely to help. Mods nudge posts that land in the wrong spot.
forum.guideline3Desc: Describe what you tried, what you expected, and what happened. Screenshots and snippets go a long way.
forum.couldNotLoadDiscussion: This discussion could not be loaded. It may have been removed.
forum.noReplies: No replies yet. Be the first to respond.
forum.signInToJoin: Sign in to join the conversation.
forum.newSubtitle: Share a question, show what you shipped, or kick off a conversation with other teams using Polymux.
forum.bodyPlaceholder: Describe what you tried, what you expected, and what happened. Snippets and screenshots go a long way.
forum.newErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

show-and-tell.label: Show & Tell
show-and-tell.description: Share what you built with Polymux

artifacts.empty: No artifacts yet. Files generated here disappear when the session ends — save anything you want to keep.
artifacts.noPreviewDesc: Download this file to view its contents.
artifacts.promoteDescription: Choose where this artifact should land in your workspace files.
artifacts.promotePathHint: An existing file at this path will be overwritten.
artifacts.promoteError: Couldn't save to storage. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Build, deploy, and manage intelligent AI agents that automate your workflows.

hero.title: Build on Polymux.
hero.subtitle: The developer platform for AI agents. Ship integrations, custom tools, and marketplace apps that plug straight into Polymux workflows.

capabilities.title: Everything you need to extend Polymux
capabilities.subtitle: From custom tools to marketplace apps — build what your team needs.

tools.title: Custom Agent Tools
tools.desc: Define tools your agents can call. From simple webhooks to full TypeScript handlers.

browser.title: Browser Integrations
browser.desc: Hook into live browser sessions. Inject UI, observe events, drive automation.

vault.title: Vault Connectors
vault.desc: Bring your own credential providers. OAuth, API keys, secrets — secured by Vault.

marketplace.title: Marketplace Apps
marketplace.desc: Publish to the Polymux marketplace. Reach thousands of teams running automations.

sdk.title: Type-safe SDKs. Honest defaults.
sdk.subtitle: Two lines to install, one to publish. The Polymux SDK is open source under MIT — built for TypeScript first, with Python and Go in the same shape.

steps.title: Ship in four steps.
steps.subtitle: Every integration follows the same path. The dashboard at dev.polymux.com runs the actual builder.

create.title: Create app
create.desc: Register your integration. Pick a name, type, and OAuth scopes.

keys.title: Get API keys
keys.desc: Generate a publishable key and signing secret. Stored in your Vault.

sdk.title: Install the SDK
sdk.desc: Bootstrap with `polymux init` or use cURL directly. TypeScript-first.

publish.title: Publish to marketplace
publish.desc: Submit for review. Once approved, your app is live for every Polymux workspace.

gallery.title: Inspiration from the marketplace
gallery.subtitle: Real apps built on Polymux. Yours could be next.

resources.title: Everything is on dev.polymux.com
resources.subtitle: One destination for docs, references, and the integration dashboard.

community.title: Discord & Forum
community.desc: Talk to the team and other builders.

passwords.newPasswordLabel: New password (leave blank to keep current)

signIns.sectionDescription: Sites the workspace stays signed into. Captured automatically during agent runs and preloaded into every new browser in this workspace.

comingSoon.title: Wallet — Coming soon
comingSoon.description: Workspace credits, budgets, and spending insights. Available soon.

banner.topUpCompleted: Top-up completed. Your balance has been updated.
banner.topUpCancelled: Top-up cancelled. No charges were made.

spendingByWorkflow.title: Spending by workflow
spendingByWorkflow.subtitle: Drill into a workflow to see its activity.

workflowsView.emptyDetail: Select a workflow to see its details.
workflowsView.noActivity: No activity for this workflow yet.

topUpModal.title: Top up balance
topUpModal.checkoutError: Couldn't start checkout. Please try again.

autoTopUpModal.title: Auto top-up
autoTopUpModal.enableDesc: Automatically reload your balance when it gets low.

policies.budgetCapsDesc: Default spending limits for new workflows.
policies.workflowTotalHint: Default cap for a single workflow run.
policies.perOpMaxHint: Largest single charge allowed without approval.
policies.llmCapHint: Maximum cost for any individual LLM call.
policies.approvalThresholdHint: Charges above this amount require approval.
policies.automationDesc: Guardrails for how long and how far automated runs can go.
policies.dailyCapHint: Total spend allowed across the workspace per day.
policies.blockAfterHoursDesc: Pause new runs outside working hours.
policies.alertsDesc: Notify the team and require approval where it matters.
policies.pauseOnExhaustionDesc: Pause workflows that hit their budget.
policies.lowBalanceDesc: Notify when wallet balance is running low.
policies.overrunDesc: Notify when a workflow overruns its budget.
policies.approveExternalDesc: Require approval before charging external services.
policies.domainDesc: Restrict which sites automated runs can reach.
policies.domainPlaceholderList: One domain per line, e.g. example.com
policies.howApply1: Allowlist: only listed domains are reachable.
policies.howApply2: Denylist: every domain except those listed is reachable.
policies.howApply4: Changes take effect on the next run.

credentialRequest.heading: The agent needs to sign in to {site}
credentialRequest.errorReveal: Could not retrieve the saved password.
credentialRequest.errorSave: Could not save the credential to the vault.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Run "{workflow}" automatically on a recurring schedule
schedule.noRuns: No upcoming runs in the next 60 days
schedule.activeNeedsVersion: Save a workflow version before enabling the schedule. The scheduler skips workflows without a saved version.

human.monthly: Runs on day {day} of every month at {time} ({tz})
human.custom: Runs on the schedule defined by the cron expression

permissions.title: Manage access to
permissions.allMembersDescription: Applies to every member unless overridden below.
permissions.cascadeNotice: Permission changes apply to this item and everything inside it.
permissions.multiCascadeWarning: These permission changes will apply to {n} items and everything inside each of them.

bugReport.heading: Report a Bug
bugReport.messagePlaceholder: Steps to reproduce, what you expected, what happened instead…
bugReport.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
bugReport.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

install.heading: Install Polymux
install.subtitle: A quiet, native home for your AI agents. One fast, focused app — across macOS, Windows, and Linux.

manual.heading: Pick your platform
manual.subtitle: Every build is signed, notarised, and ships with the same features. Download the variant that fits your setup.

extension.heading: Connect your browser
extension.subtitle: Connect the Polymux extension to run agents locally in your own browser.

mobile.heading: Mobile apps
mobile.subtitle: A native remote control for your workflows. Monitor live sessions and approve agent actions from anywhere.
mobile.ios: Remote control for iPhone and iPad. Monitor workflows and manage your workspace on the go.
mobile.android: A native Android app for remote control. Stay close to your agents anywhere.

help.heading: Need help installing?
help.description: Our docs walk through verification, updates, and troubleshooting for every platform.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your information when you use Polymux.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.subtitle: Rules and conditions for using Polymux products and services.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: What Polymux is building and who we serve.

apiReference.title: API reference
apiReference.subtitle: HTTP endpoints, auth, and integration details for developers.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies and similar technologies on our websites and services.

betaAgreement.title: Welcome to the Polymux beta
betaAgreement.lead: Polymux is under active development. Before you continue, please review what beta access means for your data and privacy.
betaAgreement.bullet1: Privacy is not guaranteed during beta. Many features are still being built and tested, and behaviour may change without notice.
betaAgreement.bullet2: Content you create, upload, or generate may be reviewed by our team and the systems we use to debug, improve, and stabilise the product.
betaAgreement.bullet3: Data you provide may be shared with trusted third-party providers (such as model, infrastructure, and analytics partners) so the product can function and improve.
betaAgreement.bullet4: Outages, data loss, and unexpected behaviour are possible. Avoid relying on Polymux for sensitive, regulated, or production-critical work.
betaAgreement.footnote: By continuing, you also acknowledge our
betaAgreement.acknowledgement: I have read and understood the above, and I consent to the exposure and data sharing described while Polymux is in beta.

featureUnavailableBody: This feature isn't available for your account yet.
accountSuspendedBody: Your account access has been temporarily suspended. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.
serverUnavailableBody: Unable to reach the server. This may be due to maintenance or a network issue.

unsubscribe.successBody: {email} will no longer receive Polymux blog newsletter emails.
unsubscribe.invalidBody: This unsubscribe link is no longer valid. If you're still receiving emails, please contact support.
unsubscribe.errorBody: We couldn't process your unsubscribe right now. Please try again in a moment.

welcome.title: Welcome to Polymux
welcome.description: Run AI-powered workflows that browse the web, work with files, and act on your behalf.

workflows.title: Build workflows visually
workflows.description: Compose steps on a canvas, run them on a schedule, and inspect every result.

browser.title: A browser that follows along
browser.description: Watch workflows operate the browser in real time, or take over whenever you need to.

vault.title: Your vault, your secrets
vault.description: Store passwords and credentials securely so workflows can sign in on your behalf.

terms.title: A few things to know
terms.description: Polymux is in beta. Please read and accept the points below before you continue.
terms.bullet1: Privacy is not guaranteed during beta. Many features are still being built and tested.
terms.bullet2: Content you create, upload, or generate may be reviewed by our team and the systems we use to debug and improve the product.
terms.bullet3: Data you provide may be shared with trusted third-party providers (model, infrastructure, and analytics partners) so the product can function and improve.
terms.bullet4: Outages, data loss, and unexpected behaviour are possible. Avoid relying on Polymux for sensitive, regulated, or production-critical work.
terms.footnote: By continuing, you also acknowledge our
terms.acknowledgement: I have read and understood the above, and I consent to the exposure and data sharing described while Polymux is in beta.
